heading: Use of public buildings for offices by instructors
label: 707 Use of public buildings for offices by instructors
text: Whenever practicable, instructors of the National Guard shall use State armories or other public buildings for offices.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)70732:74.(10th proviso under “National Guard”), .May 12, 1917, ch. 1240 Stat. 68The word “instructors” is substituted for the words “inspector-instructors”, since there are no longer any “inspector-instructors”.
